content:
# Session 37 (iter-037) — review

## Condition: NO PROVER LANE (intentional closeout)

- `attempts_raw.jsonl` line 1: `no_prover_lane: true`. `meta.json`: `planValidate=ok_intentional_skip`,
  `objectives=0`, `prover.durationSecs=0`. No `.lean` edits. `sync_leanok`: iter=37, +0/−0,
  chapters_touched=[].
- Sorry count: unchanged. `SectionGradedRing.lean` SORRY-FREE (closed iter-036). Global remaining:
  4 χ sorries in `QuotScheme.lean` (deferred since iter-001 — need cohomology scope) + `RelativeSpec`
  (out-of-cone). No closable in-cone sorry exists ⇒ mechanical no-dispatch.

## What this iter did (plan agent, no Lean)
Consolidation only: STRATEGY.md → SNAP-S1 to `## Completed`; PROGRESS/task_pending rewritten to closeout;
ARCHON_MEMORY pruned ~7k→~1.6k chars; stale root STRATEGY/PROGRESS strays synced. strategy-critic
(closeout) = SOUND, 0 CHALLENGE/REJECT — confirmed the stop is not stopping-short.

## Leg status — DELIVERED, axiom-clean, await merge
Closable scope all done: `Grassmannian.represents` + `tautologicalQuotient_epi` (GR functor-repr) +
B1–B7 assoc + ∀L `GSemiring` + invertible-L `GCommSemiring` + SNAP-S1 module
`sectionGradedModule_gmodule` (`M(X,L,F)=⊕Γ(F⊗L^{⊗m})` as `DirectSum.Gmodule`). No live prover frontier.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. No chapter edits this iter; sync_leanok +0/−0. No rename, no demonstrably-wrong marker. The ~16
  leandag "unproved" nodes = out-of-cone deferrals + delivered-but-unmarked (anon-instance/abstract pins,
  sync over-strip) + 2 downstream no-Lean-decl nodes — all merge-back bookkeeping per ARCHON_MEMORY.

## Blueprint-doctor — out-of-cone, do NOT edit
All findings on dormant out-of-cone chapters: Cohomology_FlatBaseChange (2 phantom `covers` files +
14 broken `\ref`); Picard_GlueDescent (4 broken `\cref`/`\uses`); Picard_QuotScheme (13 broken `\cref`).
Active SGR chapter doctor-clean. Extraction/merge artifacts — resolve at merge per ARCHON_MEMORY.

## No regression
`Grassmannian.represents` + `tautologicalQuotient_epi` + B1–B7 + ∀L GSemiring + invertible-L GCommSemiring
+ module lane all intact axiom-clean (file sorry-free, unchanged since iter-036).

## Recommendations for next session
See `recommendations.md`. Headline: no in-loop prover work remains; hold at merge unless USER_HINTS opens
cohomology scope for the χ leg.
